title: drynaria macrosora
intro: Drynaria macrosora, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or tuckahoe fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Drynaria macrosora include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially treating conditions such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Drynaria macrosora is often prepared in herbal form through decoctions or infusions, and it is also available in capsule or tablet form for convenient consumption.
